rootCauses.primary: Missing GSIS rows in player_external_ids for IDP/K players.
notes: Existing generic GSIS bootstrap found zero stats_id/ESPN bridge-safe writes.
H9.9 only treats exact normalized name + compatible position + team as auto-safe.
Exact name matches without team agreement remain manual review.
